Tools and functions for configuring, building, and processing Pebble SDK projects using Waf.


## Files
- **[pebble_sdk.py](pebble_sdk.py.md)**: Tools and functions for configuring and building Pebble SDK projects using Waf.
- **[pebble_sdk_common.py](pebble_sdk_common.py.md)**: Tools and configurations for building Pebble SDK projects using the Waf build system.
- **[pebble_sdk_lib.py](pebble_sdk_lib.py.md)**: Build configuration and task generation for Pebble SDK projects using Waf, including platform-specific setups.
- **[process_bundle.py](process_bundle.py.md)**: Implements tasks and features to generate library and app bundles for distribution in the Pebble firmware.
- **[process_elf.py](process_elf.py.md)**: Generates a binary file by injecting metadata from an ELF file and resources.
- **[process_headers.py](process_headers.py.md)**: Processes and copies header files specified in the wscript file and generated during the build.
- **[process_js.py](process_js.py.md)**: Functions and tasks for processing, merging, and linting JavaScript files in the Pebble firmware build system.
- **[process_message_keys.py](process_message_keys.py.md)**: Processes message keys for Pebble firmware, generating header, C, and JSON files for builds.
- **[process_sdk_resources.py](process_sdk_resources.py.md)**: Processes SDK resources by generating task generators for resource handling, including resource IDs and packaging.
- **[process_timeline_resources.py](process_timeline_resources.py.md)**: Processes timeline resources for publishedMedia, generating JSON files and lookup tables for resource ID mapping.
- **[report_memory_usage.py](report_memory_usage.py.md)**: Generates and prints memory usage reports for binaries and resources in the Pebble firmware.
- **[sdk_helpers.py](sdk_helpers.py.md)**: Helper functions for managing SDK platforms, resources, and configurations in the Pebble firmware build system.
- **[sdk_paths.py](sdk_paths.py.md)**: Imports paths required by the SDK file structure for building Pebble projects.
